sections.opener: Hello Principal [Principal's Last Name], this is [Sales Agent Name] from Burger King. I'm calling because with graduation just around the corner, ensuring a memorable and hassle-free dining experience for 150 students can be quite a challenge, couldn't it?
sections.value_prop: Our new catering service takes the stress out of feeding a large group, offering delicious, flame-grilled favorites that students already love, delivered fresh and hot. Imagine satisfying 150 graduates with ease, without compromising on quality or your budget. We handle all the details so you can focus on celebrating their big day.
sections.pricing_handle: I completely understand that budget is a key consideration for school events. Our catering solutions are designed to be cost-effective while delivering incredible value and student satisfaction, minimizing complaints and maximizing smiles. We can tailor a package that fits your specific needs and ensures a high return on investment in terms of student happiness and administrative ease.
sections.timing_objection: I respect your time, Principal. I only need about 10-15 minutes to quickly show you how seamless we can make the graduation catering. If now isn't ideal, I'd be happy to schedule a brief call at your convenience next week, or perhaps even send a quick 2-minute video overview?
sections.close: Given the importance of this event, I'd love to offer you and your team a complimentary tasting of our most popular catering options. This would give you a firsthand experience of the quality and convenience we provide, helping you make a confident decision for your graduates. Would Tuesday or Thursday afternoon next week work for a quick tasting at your convenience?
